candidates.title: Safety and alignment in an era of long-horizon models
candidates.summary: OpenAI shares lessons from deploying long-running AI models, highlighting new safety risks, observed failures, and improved safeguards through iterative deployment.

candidates.title: Can an Apple lawsuit derail OpenAI’s hardware plans?
candidates.summary: On the latest episode of Equity, we debate whether Apple's lawsuit will cast a shadow over OpenAi's much-discussed plans to get into hardware and go public.

candidates.title: Adobe camera app’s new feature will critique your photos using AI
candidates.summary: Adobe's Project Indigo can now remove all kinds of backgrounds from photos you snap using the app.
